<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Solutions\Laravel\SuggestUsingMysql8DatabaseSolution as BaseSuggestUsingMysql8DatabaseSolutionAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\Solution; class SuggestUsingMysql8DatabaseSolution extends BaseSuggestUsingMysql8DatabaseSolutionAlias implements Solution { }
